---
title: "Ch.09"
output: html_document
date: "2023-08-08"
---

```{r}
x1 <- c(19, 23, 27, 35, 44, 51, 59, 66)
y1 <- c(124, 117, 120, 132, 128, 142, 143, 135)

plot(y1 ~ x1, ylim = c(110, 150))
result <- lm(y1 ~ x1)
abline(result, ylim = c(110, 150))
summary(result)
```


```{r}
age <- c(3.0, 4.0, 5.0, 6.0, 8.0, 9.0, 10.0, 11.0, 12.0, 14.0, 15.0, 16.0, 17.0)
wing <- c(1.4, 1.5, 2.2, 2.4, 3.1, 3.2, 3.2, 3.9, 4.1, 4.7, 4.5, 5.2, 5.0)

fit_lm <- lm(wing ~ age)

res_conf <- predict(fit_lm, interval = "confidence")
matplot(age, res_conf, xlab = "day", ylab = "wing(cm)", type = "l")
points(age, wing)

res_pred <- predict(fit_lm, interval = "prediction")
matplot(age, res_pred, xlab = "day", ylab = "wing(cm)", type = "l")
points(age, wing)
```
